title: Gwen's Superflat Survival plus
description: A mod made for Enhancing the superflat survival experience in small but noticeable ways.
body:
A mod made for Enhancing the superflat survival experience in small but noticeable ways. this mod includes dirt slabs and walls, rocks which can be obtained from dirt on a random chance basis, these rocks can be used to craft gravel, in a recipe to make cobblestone as all as in a recipe for a new cooking station called a firepit which is crafted from 1 torch 4 rocks and 1 cobblestone. this mod also adds an item you can craft called prepared rotten flesh which can be cooked into zombie jerky via the firepit. this mod also adds a way to get emeralds from wandering traders, but not for free, and much more!

new textures by Dorcamo
